name: Snake Vs Human
author: Poki
description: Snake Vs Human is an action game where you face off against giant, menacing snakes! Collect resources to upgrade your firepower. More bullets, faster shots, and stronger attacks, so you can fight to stay alive. But beware, the snakes keep getting faster, smarter, and deadlier! Stay alert, aim true, and blast your way to victory. Lock, load, and survive the serpent showdown! How to play Snake Vs Human? Click or tap to shoot. Who created Snake Vs Human? Snake Vs Human is created by Clap Clap Games. This is their first game on Poki! How can I play Snake Vs Human for free? You can play Snake Vs Human for free on Poki. Can I play Snake Vs Human on mobile devices and desktop? Snake Vs Human can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
